text_block_list.text: Fu... ku... come... cellar... There... you<n>will...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I will?! Wait! Come back! Is this a<n>prophecy?!
What will I do in the<n>cellar?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Flyin' fragalo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking around the academy<n>when I see
Matikanefukukitaru<n>frenziedly picking every
flower in<n>sight!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... P-please don't stopme! I must fulfill the prophecy I saw inmy dream, to achieve happiness!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I look down at her feet to find a single<n>sheet of
paper. Scribbled on it are<n>what appear to be
drawings of<n>flowers, a dancer, some numbers,
and other various things.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It isn't a doodle! It is a ritual diagram!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
While back home visiting my family, I<n>received a
divine message in a dream<n>telling me to search
for something in<n>the cellar... When I went, I
discovered<n>this paper!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Can you believe the prophecy came<n>true?! The
ritual depicted in this<n>diagram must reveal
something truly<n>miraculous!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Except I'm having troubleunderstanding it. Still, I willeventually decipher its contents to successfully perform the ritual, andsoon be blessed beyond imagination!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She suddenly dashes away, brimming<n>with
excitement. Worried about what<n>she might be
getting up to, I quickly<n>follow.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
La la la... ♪ Chrysanthemum flowers,<n>pluckity
plucked... ♪ Boiled with a<n>dash of—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oho, chrysanthemum flowers! And<n>actually, they
look quite like the<n>flowers in my ritual diagram.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: In that case... Time to dig in!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah?! F-Fuku?! Those are mine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Burp... Finally, with this... Blegh!No... I have to hold it in!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right! Next is... to run on the track<n>while
dancing! The ritual diagram's<n>word is absolute!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Uh oh, Fukukitaru's up to funny<n>business again!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...When will we get our chance to run?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I try to stop Matikanefukukitaru to no<n>avail. She
continues her rampage<n>throughout the academy...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I understand your side of the story.<n>However, I
cannot overlook the fact<n>that you ignored a
trainer's warnings<n>and caused trouble for the
other<n>students.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I-I'm really, really sorry...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... I was feeling lucky, but ended<n>up with
great misfortune... What do I<n>do?
choice_data_list: Are you sure that's really a diagram for a ritual?
Are you sure that's really a diagram for a ritual?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course it... Well, it probably is? I<n>mean, I think
so, at least. G-give me<n>just a second!

text_block_list.name: Fukukitaru's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Looks like your dad and grandma<n>don't know
anything about a ritual<n>diagram in the cellar either.
We don't<n>keep any of our Shinto materials
down there.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...It looks like neither Mom, Dad, nor<n>Granny
knows about it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What could it possibly beee?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: How could no one have any clue?!Someone must have hidden itaway there! Who could it have been?!Who?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's no waaay nobody knows!<n>Aaargh!
Someone tell me what this<n>iiiis!
choice_data_list:
Maybe it's a secret spell for extreme
happiness?!
Something that must be sealed away, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! A secret spell for extreme happiness?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense, I think?! If it's a<n>secret spell
of the highest order, no<n>wonder nobody knows
about it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aww, of course! I made all this fuss<n>for nothing!
I'll be back tomorrow to<n>solve this riddle!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel a kind of respect<n>for how
quickly Matikanefukukitaru<n>gets right back on
her feet.

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meooow!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Was that a black cat thatjust passed by?! Is it a sign of badthings to come?! Are the gods tellingme I shouldn't stick my nose into thisany further?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eek! Great Shiraoki, please save<n>meee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She runs off before I can even say a<n>word,
leaving me stupefied.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I knew it! I knew it had to be<n>something like that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, I must return the paper to the<n>cellar! But
first, I shall seal away any<n>evils! Foonjarga, be
forever gone!<n>Come back, no no!
Sigh... Really? But... one dayyou'll find... I know... you will...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh? I just felt a wave of warmth<n>wash over!
Could it have been the<n>spirit of someone
passed?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The best I can muster is a puzzled<n>nod. I could
have sworn I heard a<n>voice... I part ways with
her, leaving<n>the mystery unanswered.
